description_zh: Audemars Piguet（爱彼）是瑞士顶级奢侈腕表品牌，由朱尔-路易·奥德玛（Jules-Louis Audemars）和爱德华-奥古斯特·皮盖（Edward-Auguste Piguet）于1875年在瑞士侏罗山谷的勒布拉苏斯（Le Brassus）创立，至今仍由创始人家族掌控。爱彼表以"驾驭常规，铸就创新"为精神内核，在高级制表史上占据了独特地位。1972年，爱彼推出了改变整个钟表行业的标志性作品——Royal Oak皇家橡树系列，这是世界上第一款采用精钢材质打造的奢华运动腕表，其灵感源自英国皇家海军舰船舷窗的八角形表圈设计，开创了豪华运动钢表的全新品类。如今，皇家橡树系列已成为辨识度最高、最受追捧的奢华运动腕表之一。爱彼旗下的另一大旗舰系列Royal Oak Offshore皇家橡树离岸型则以其更大胆、更阳刚的设计延续了品牌的创新精神。作为瑞士仅存的少数几家独立家族制表企业之一，爱彼始终坚持小批量、高水准的制作理念，年产量约4万至5万枚。

languages.en: Audemars Piguet is a prestigious Swiss luxury watch manufacturer founded in 1875 in Le Brassus, Vallée de Joux, by Jules-Louis Audemars and Edward-Auguste Piguet. Still family-controlled, the brand is defined by its motto 'To break the rules, you must first master them.' Audemars Piguet revolutionized horology in 1972 with the Royal Oak, the world's first luxury sports watch crafted in stainless steel, featuring an iconic octagonal bezel inspired by naval portholes. The Royal Oak created an entirely new category of luxury steel sports watches and remains one of the most recognizable and coveted watch designs. The more audacious Royal Oak Offshore collection continues this legacy of bold innovation. As one of the few remaining independent family-owned watchmakers, Audemars Piguet produces approximately 40,000-50,000 watches annually, each embodying exceptional craftsmanship and avant-garde design.
